title: Data Scientist
description: We are looking for a Data Scientist to join our AI team. You will work on building ML models, analyzing large datasets, and deploying models to production. Required skills: Python, scikit-learn, pandas, SQL, machine learning, statistical analysis, data visualization. Experience with deep learning frameworks like TensorFlow or PyTorch is a plus.

title: Senior Data Scientist
description: Drive data science for Amazon supply chain. Build forecasting models, work with Spark, lead junior scientists. Required: Python, R, ML, SQL, Spark, statistics, causal inference.

title: Data Scientist - NLP
description: Build NLP models for Indian languages. Fine-tune transformer models, build text classification and NER pipelines. Required: Python, HuggingFace, spaCy, BERT, FastAPI, Docker.

title: Data Scientist
description: Build recommendation and personalization systems. Work on collaborative filtering, deep learning models, and A/B testing. Required: Python, ML, SQL, recommendation systems, statistics.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Design and deploy scalable ML systems. Build ML pipelines, model training, MLOps practices. Required: Python, TensorFlow/PyTorch, Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow, AWS/GCP.

title: ML Engineer
description: Build AI systems for electric vehicles — route optimization, battery predictions, driver safety. Required: Python, ML, TensorFlow, edge deployment, IoT, time-series.

title: AI/ML Engineer
description: Work on cutting-edge AI products. Research and implement ML algorithms, fine-tune LLMs, ship AI features to billions of users. Requirements: Python, TensorFlow, LLMs, transformers, distributed training.

title: Software Engineer - Backend
description: Build high-scale distributed systems serving millions of users. Design REST APIs, microservices, optimize database queries. Required: Java or Python, Spring Boot or FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, Docker.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Build fintech products used by millions of businesses. Work across frontend and backend, design scalable APIs. Required: React.js, Node.js, Python or Go, PostgreSQL, Redis.

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze business data, build dashboards, run SQL queries, perform statistical analysis. Required: SQL, Python, Excel, Tableau or Power BI.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage and scale cloud infrastructure for India's largest e-commerce. CI/CD pipelines, Kubernetes, monitoring. Required: AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Jenkins, Prometheus.

title: Software Engineer - Frontend
description: Build performant UIs for social commerce. Work with React.js, implement designs, optimize performance. Required: React.js, JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML, CSS, Redux.

title: Data Scientist - Computer Vision
description: Build computer vision models for product recognition and shelf analytics. Required: Python, PyTorch, OpenCV, YOLO, deep learning, CNN, image processing.

title: Junior Data Scientist
description: Entry-level data scientist role. Work with senior scientists on ML models. Learn production ML workflows. Required: Python, pandas, scikit-learn, SQL, statistics. Final year projects welcome.

title: Research Scientist - ML
description: Conduct research in machine learning and publish at top conferences. Work on large-scale ML systems. Required: PhD preferred, Python, deep learning, research publications, PyTorch.

title: MLOps Engineer
description: Build and maintain ML infrastructure at scale. Model serving, monitoring, feature stores, CI/CD for ML. Required: Python, MLflow, Kubeflow, Docker, Kubernetes, Airflow.

title: Business Analyst
description: Analyze business processes, gather requirements, create dashboards, work with stakeholders. Required: SQL, Excel, Tableau, Power BI, communication, problem-solving.

title: Python Developer
description: Build backend services and APIs using Python. Work with Django or FastAPI, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, Docker. Required: Python, Django, FastAPI, SQL, Git, REST APIs.
